text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, we learn that Narita Brian has suffered
an injury. During our visit to the hospital, Hishi
Amazon announces that she'll be waiting for her
at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some time, Narita Brian is discharged. She
asks Hishi Amazon why she's so fixated on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon replies that something about Brian
makes her want to catch up to her—to overtake
her—no matter how far away she gets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian looks satisfied by the response. It
turns out that she, too, has someone she wants to
overtake.
